name: Fried Green Tomato Grilled Cheese
servings: serves 4 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 10–15 minutes

ingredients.item: medium to large green tomatoes, sliced ¼ inch thick
Salt and cracked pepper to taste

method: Season the tomato slices liberally with salt and pepper.
Add the panko, eggs, and flour to three separate bowls. Dip the tomato slices in the flour, then eggs, then panko to coat evenly.
Heat 1 inch of oil over medium heat in a medium saucepan or skillet.
Add the tomato slices in batches and fry 2 minutes per side until evenly golden.
Drain over paper towels, sprinkle with salt.
Butter 4 of the bread slices and top with cheese slices.
Top with 2 tomato slices and another cheese slice. Top with the remaining bread slices.
Heat the sandwiches in a lightly greased saucepan over medium heat. Cook until evenly brown on both sides.
